title: Fusion's 67
description: A mod that screams well.... 6 7! when seen in chat.
body: ![LogoBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a742a29d75e78dab6dda5352cc843d8ea76ad4b_0.webp) # Fusion's 67 ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/fusions-67?style=for-the-badge) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/fusions-67?style=for-the-badge) This mod reads your chat for any instance of '67' and many of its variations. When '67' is found, it plays a soundbite for every message found. ## Sounds There are currently 4 sounds available: kid, dootdoot, narrator, and fusiongamer (myself). The volume may be changed inside the mod config or is also affected by the Player/Master volume sliders in options. [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M61V7YTQ)
